goal: Create plugins/session-favorites.js that adds star buttons to sessions and pins favorites to top
sub_tasks: T1: Create IIFE skeleton with __SessionFavoritesInited guard
T3: In handler: querySelectorAll('.session-item'), forEach add a star button
T4: Star click toggles favorite: read localStorage key 'hermes-favorites', update, save with try/catch
T5: After toggling, re-sort the DOM: favorites first (append them), then others
T6: On plugin init and on each render: read stored favorites and apply star styling (filled vs outline)
T7: Handle cases where session item has no dataset.id — derive from onclick handler text or skip
guard_focus: Does each session item show a star?
Does clicking star toggle the saved state in localStorage?
Do favorited sessions move to the top?
Does re-running loadSessions preserve favorite states (stars re-render)?
notes: ~50 lines. Must inspect the exact DOM structure of session items to find a reliable session ID.
